title: 規則なしの MCP ツールは既定 ask -> headless は auto-deny(denials 記録)

probes.prompt: Call the tool mcp__probe__read_path with argument path = "$REPO/cases/01-permission/P11-mcp-tool-rules/a-baseline-ask/note.txt". Then reply with ONLY the exact text the tool returned, nothing else. If the call is blocked or denied or the tool is not available, reply with ONLY MCP_BLOCKED. Do not use any other tool.

hypothesis: MCP ツールは permission 規則が無ければ既定 ask(headless=auto-deny / SDK=canUseTool 発火)。read-only 組込ツールのような無条件承認集合(P4-i)には入らない。
